proverif_model.model_code:
(* ProVerif model for Matter On/Off Cluster (extended FSM model) *)
(* Generated from FSM specification *)

(* === 1. Type Declarations === *)
type state.
type command.
type status.
type effect_id.
type effect_variant.
type onoff_control_t.
type endpoint.
type bool3.                (* three-valued StartUpOnOff: null, Off, On, Toggle *)
type bool.                 (* logical booleans for attributes/capabilities *)
type nat16.                (* abstract 16-bit natural values *)


(* === 2. Channel Declarations === *)
free c: channel.                    (* Public command/response channel *)
free internal: channel [private].   (* Internal state & attribute channel *)


(* === 3. Constant Declarations === *)

(* ---- States ---- *)
const st_StartupState: state.
const st_BaseOff: state.
const st_BaseOn: state.
const st_TimedOn: state.
const st_DelayedOff: state.

(* ---- Commands / Triggers ---- *)
const cmd_Off: command.
const cmd_On: command.
const cmd_Toggle: command.
const cmd_OffWithEffect: command.
const cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene: command.
const cmd_OnWithTimedOff: command.
const trig_Startup: command.
const trig_TimerTick: command.

(* ---- Status values ---- *)
const st_SUCCESS: status.
const st_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND: status.

(* ---- Boolean-like values ---- *)
const b_true: bool.
const b_false: bool.

(* Three-valued StartUpOnOff constants: null, Off, On, Toggle *)
const su_null: bool3.
const su_Off: bool3.
const su_On: bool3.
const su_Toggle: bool3.

(* Special nat16 constants used in guards *)
const nat16_0: nat16.
const nat16_1: nat16.
const nat16_FFFF: nat16.

(* Some abstract effect identifiers and variants (values not security relevant) *)
const effid0: effect_id.
const effvar0: effect_variant.

(* Example onoff_control values *)
const onoff_ctrl0: onoff_control_t.
const onoff_ctrl1: onoff_control_t.

(* OFFONLY feature flags *)
const feat_OFFONLY_true: bool.
const feat_OFFONLY_false: bool.

(* Capability flags *)
const cap_supports_OnTime_true: bool.
const cap_supports_OnTime_false: bool.
const cap_supports_OffWaitTime_true: bool.
const cap_supports_OffWaitTime_false: bool.

(* GlobalSceneControl flag values *)
const gsc_true: bool.
const gsc_false: bool.

(* OnOff attribute values as bool *)
const onoff_TRUE: bool.
const onoff_FALSE: bool.

(* Attribute/variable labels just for documentation via events *)
const attr_OnOff: bitstring.
const attr_OnTime: bitstring.
const attr_OffWaitTime: bitstring.
const attr_GlobalSceneControl: bitstring.
const attr_StartUpOnOff: bitstring.
const attr_PreviousOnOff: bitstring.
const attr_supports_OnTime: bitstring.
const attr_supports_OffWaitTime: bitstring.
const attr_OFFONLY: bitstring.


(* === 4. Function / Helper Declarations === *)

(* We do not model arithmetic precisely; we use abstract constructors to stand for
   min, max, decrement operations, and comparisons are abstracted by pattern
   matching on special constants when needed. *)
fun min(nat16, nat16): nat16.
fun max(nat16, nat16): nat16.
fun dec(nat16): nat16.

(* Extract AcceptOnlyWhenOn bit from onoff_control_t.
   We keep it abstract; the FSM guards refer to a bound variable representing this bit. *)
fun accept_only_when_on(onoff_control_t): bool.


(* === 5. Event Declarations === *)

(* Generic command and state events *)
event CommandReceived(endpoint, command).
event StateChanged(endpoint, state, state).

(* Attribute change logging (for potential correspondence properties) *)
event AttributeSet(endpoint, bitstring, bitstring).

(* ---- FSM Action Facts mapped to ProVerif events ---- *)

event OffReceived(endpoint).
event OffApplied(endpoint).
event OnTimeClearedByOff(endpoint).
event OffResponseSent(endpoint, status).

event OnReceived(endpoint).
event OnNotSupportedOffOnly(endpoint).
event OnApplied(endpoint).
event OffWaitTimeClearedByOn(endpoint).
event OnResponseSent(endpoint, status).

event ToggleReceived(endpoint).
event ToggleNotSupportedOffOnly(endpoint).
event ToggleAppliedToOn(endpoint).
event ToggleAppliedToOff(endpoint).
event OnTimeClearedByToggleToOn(endpoint).
event OffWaitTimeClearedByToggleToOff(endpoint).
event ToggleResponseSent(endpoint, status).

event OffWithEffectReceived(endpoint, effect_id, effect_variant).
event GlobalSceneStored(endpoint).
event GlobalSceneControlCleared(endpoint).
event OffAppliedByEffect(endpoint).
event OnTimeClearedByOffWithEffect(endpoint).
event OffWithEffectResponseSent(endpoint, status).

event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived(endpoint).
event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneDiscarded(endpoint).
event GlobalSceneRecalled(endpoint).
event GlobalSceneControlSet(endpoint).
event OffWaitTimeClearedByOnWithRecallGlobalScene(endpoint).
event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent(endpoint, status).

event OnWithTimedOffReceived(endpoint, onoff_control_t, nat16, nat16).
event OnWithTimedOffDiscardedAcceptOnlyWhenOn(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffUpdateDelayedOff(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffUpdateTimedOn(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffTimerStarted(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffResponseSent(endpoint, status).
event OnWithTimedOffTickTimedOn(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffTickDelayedOff(endpoint).
event OnTimeDecremented(endpoint).
event OffWaitTimeDecremented(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffTransitionToOff(endpoint).
event OnWithTimedOffTimerStopped(endpoint).

event StartupOccurred(endpoint).
event StartupRestorePrevious(endpoint, bool).
event StartupForceOff(endpoint).
event StartupForceOn(endpoint).
event StartupToggleToOn(endpoint).
event StartupToggleToOff(endpoint).


(* === 6. Query Declarations === *)

(* Example reachability: can we reach BaseOn state from startup? *)
query ep: endpoint;
      event(StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOn)).

(* Example sanity: Any Off/On/Toggle/TimedOff related state change must be caused by some command. *)
query ep: endpoint, s1: state, s2: state;
    event(StateChanged(ep, s1, s2))
    ==>
    (event(CommandReceived(ep, cmd_On))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, cmd_Off))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, cmd_Toggle))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, cmd_OffWithEffect))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, cmd_OnWithTimedOff))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, trig_Startup))
     || event(CommandReceived(ep, trig_TimerTick))).


(* === 7. Process Macro Definitions === *)

(* The device process is modeled as a replicated process that, for each interaction,
   takes the current abstract FSM state and attributes as input, then applies one
   enabled transition based on the incoming command and guard conditions.           *)

let Device(ep: endpoint) =
    (* Input current FSM state and all relevant attributes on internal channel *)
    in(internal,
       (curst: state,
        onoff: bool,
        ontime: nat16,
        offwait: nat16,
        gsc: bool,
        startup: bool3,
        prev_onoff: bool,
        supports_OnTime: bool,
        supports_OffWaitTime: bool,
        offonly_feat: bool));

    (* Input a command/trigger and any associated parameters *)
    in(c,
       (cmd: command,
        effid: effect_id,
        effvar: effect_variant,
        onoff_ctrl: onoff_control_t,
        on_time_field: nat16,
        off_wait_time_field: nat16));

    (* Derive AcceptOnlyWhenOn bit from onoff_control_t *)
    let aow: bool = accept_only_when_on(onoff_ctrl) in

    event CommandReceived(ep, cmd);

    (* ---- Startup transitions from StartupState ---- *)
    if curst = st_StartupState then
        if cmd = trig_Startup then
            (* T_Startup_RestorePrevOff *)
            if startup = su_null && prev_onoff = onoff_FALSE then
                event StartupOccurred(ep);
                event StartupRestorePrevious(ep, onoff_FALSE);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOff);
                event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, "FALSE");
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Startup_RestorePrevOn *)
            else if startup = su_null && prev_onoff = onoff_TRUE then
                event StartupOccurred(ep);
                event StartupRestorePrevious(ep, onoff_TRUE);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOn);
                event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, "TRUE");
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Startup_ForceOff *)
            else if startup = su_Off then
                event StartupOccurred(ep);
                event StartupForceOff(ep);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOff);
                event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, "FALSE");
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Startup_ForceOn *)
            else if startup = su_On then
                event StartupOccurred(ep);
                event StartupForceOn(ep);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOn);
                event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, "TRUE");
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Startup_ToggleToOn *)
            else if startup = su_Toggle && prev_onoff = onoff_FALSE then
                event StartupOccurred(ep);
                event StartupToggleToOn(ep);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOn);
                event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, "TRUE");
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Startup_ToggleToOff *)
            else if startup = su_Toggle && prev_onoff = onoff_TRUE then
                event StartupOccurred(ep);
                event StartupToggleToOff(ep);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_StartupState, st_BaseOff);
                event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, "FALSE");
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            else
                (* No startup guard matched: stay in StartupState *)
                out(internal,
                    (curst,
                     onoff,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* Non-startup command while in StartupState: ignore *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
    else

    (* ---- Off command transitions ---- *)
    if cmd = cmd_Off then
        (* T_Off_FromOn *)
        if curst = st_BaseOn then
            event OffReceived(ep);
            event OffApplied(ep);
            event OnTimeClearedByOff(ep);
            event OffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
            event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
            out(internal,
                (st_BaseOff,
                 onoff_FALSE,
                 nat16_0,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        (* T_Off_FromTimedOn *)
        else if curst = st_TimedOn then
            event OffReceived(ep);
            event OffApplied(ep);
            event OnTimeClearedByOff(ep);
            event OnWithTimedOffTimerStopped(ep);
            event OffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
            event StateChanged(ep, st_TimedOn, st_BaseOff);
            out(internal,
                (st_BaseOff,
                 onoff_FALSE,
                 nat16_0,
                 nat16_0,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        (* T_Off_FromDelayedOff *)
        else if curst = st_DelayedOff then
            event OffReceived(ep);
            event OffApplied(ep);
            event OnTimeClearedByOff(ep);
            event OnWithTimedOffTimerStopped(ep);
            event OffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
            event StateChanged(ep, st_DelayedOff, st_BaseOff);
            out(internal,
                (st_BaseOff,
                 onoff_FALSE,
                 nat16_0,
                 nat16_0,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        (* T_Off_FromOff *)
        else if curst = st_BaseOff then
            event OffReceived(ep);
            event OffApplied(ep);
            event OffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
            event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOff);
            out(internal,
                (st_BaseOff,
                 onoff_FALSE,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* Off in other states not explicitly modeled: no-op *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- On command transitions ---- *)
    else if cmd = cmd_On then
        if curst = st_BaseOff then
            (* T_On_OffOnly *)
            if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_true then
                event OnReceived(ep);
                event OnNotSupportedOffOnly(ep);
                event OnResponseSent(ep, st_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND)
            (* T_On_FromOff_Simple_NoOnTime *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_false then
                event OnReceived(ep);
                event OnApplied(ep);
                event OnResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_On_FromOff_Simple_NoOffWaitTime *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_false then
                event OnReceived(ep);
                event OnApplied(ep);
                event OnResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_On_FromOff_WithTimers_ClearOffWait (OnTime == 0) *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_true
                 && ontime = nat16_0 then
                event OnReceived(ep);
                event OnApplied(ep);
                event OffWaitTimeClearedByOn(ep);
                event OnResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     nat16_0,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_On_FromOff_WithTimers_KeepOffWait (OnTime != 0) *)
            else
                (* offonly_feat = FALSE, supports_OnTime = TRUE, supports_OffWaitTime = TRUE, OnTime != 0 (abstracted) *)
                event OnReceived(ep);
                event OnApplied(ep);
                event OnResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        (* T_On_FromOn (idempotent) *)
        else if curst = st_BaseOn && offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false then
            event OnReceived(ep);
            event OnApplied(ep);
            event OnResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
            event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOn);
            out(internal,
                (st_BaseOn,
                 onoff_TRUE,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* Other states: ignore On *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- Toggle command transitions ---- *)
    else if cmd = cmd_Toggle then
        if curst = st_BaseOff then
            (* T_Toggle_OffOnly *)
            if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_true then
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleNotSupportedOffOnly(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND)
            (* T_Toggle_OffToOn_NoOnTime *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_false then
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOn(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Toggle_OffToOn_NoOffWaitTime *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_false then
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOn(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Toggle_OffToOn_WithTimers *)
            else
                (* supports_OnTime = TRUE and supports_OffWaitTime = TRUE case *)
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOn(ep);
                event OnTimeClearedByToggleToOn(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     nat16_0,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else if curst = st_BaseOn then
            (* T_Toggle_OnToOff_NoOnTime *)
            if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
               && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_false then
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOff(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Toggle_OnToOff_NoOffWaitTime *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_false then
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOff(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Toggle_OnToOff_WithTimers_ClearOffWait when OnTime == 0 *)
            else if offonly_feat = feat_OFFONLY_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_true
                 && ontime = nat16_0 then
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOff(ep);
                event OffWaitTimeClearedByToggleToOff(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     nat16_0,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_Toggle_OnToOff_WithTimers_KeepOffWait (OnTime != 0) *)
            else
                event ToggleReceived(ep);
                event ToggleAppliedToOff(ep);
                event ToggleResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* Toggle in other states ignored *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- OffWithEffect command transitions (only specified from BaseOn) ---- *)
    else if cmd = cmd_OffWithEffect then
        if curst = st_BaseOn then
            (* T_OffWithEffect_GlobalSceneTrue_FromOn *)
            if gsc = gsc_true then
                event OffWithEffectReceived(ep, effid, effvar);
                event GlobalSceneStored(ep);
                event GlobalSceneControlCleared(ep);
                event OffAppliedByEffect(ep);
                event OnTimeClearedByOffWithEffect(ep);
                event OffWithEffectResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     nat16_0,
                     offwait,
                     gsc_false,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OffWithEffect_GlobalSceneFalse_FromOn *)
            else
                event OffWithEffectReceived(ep, effid, effvar);
                event OffAppliedByEffect(ep);
                event OffWithEffectResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* OffWithEffect from other states ignored *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- OnWithRecallGlobalScene command transitions (from BaseOff) ---- *)
    else if cmd = cmd_OnWithRecallGlobalScene then
        if curst = st_BaseOff then
            (* T_OnWithRecallGlobalScene_Discard *)
            if gsc = gsc_true then
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived(ep);
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneDiscarded(ep);
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc_true,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OnWithRecallGlobalScene_Recall_ClearOffWait *)
            else if gsc = gsc_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_true
                 && ontime = nat16_0 then
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived(ep);
                event GlobalSceneRecalled(ep);
                event GlobalSceneControlSet(ep);
                event OffWaitTimeClearedByOnWithRecallGlobalScene(ep);
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     nat16_0,
                     gsc_true,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OnWithRecallGlobalScene_Recall_NoTimerUpdate_NoOnTime *)
            else if gsc = gsc_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_false then
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived(ep);
                event GlobalSceneRecalled(ep);
                event GlobalSceneControlSet(ep);
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc_true,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OnWithRecallGlobalScene_Recall_NoTimerUpdate_NoOffWaitTime *)
            else if gsc = gsc_false
                 && supports_OnTime = cap_supports_OnTime_true
                 && supports_OffWaitTime = cap_supports_OffWaitTime_false then
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived(ep);
                event GlobalSceneRecalled(ep);
                event GlobalSceneControlSet(ep);
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc_true,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OnWithRecallGlobalScene_Recall_NoTimerUpdate_OnTimeNonZero *)
            else
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived(ep);
                event GlobalSceneRecalled(ep);
                event GlobalSceneControlSet(ep);
                event OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc_true,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* OnWithRecallGlobalScene from other states ignored *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- OnWithTimedOff command transitions ---- *)
    else if cmd = cmd_OnWithTimedOff then
        (* We only partially abstract timers and numeric guards. *)
        if curst = st_BaseOff then
            (* T_OnWithTimedOff_Discard_AcceptOnlyWhenOn *)
            if aow = b_true && onoff = onoff_FALSE then
                event OnWithTimedOffReceived(ep, onoff_ctrl, on_time_field, off_wait_time_field);
                event OnWithTimedOffDiscardedAcceptOnlyWhenOn(ep);
                event OnWithTimedOffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_BaseOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_BaseOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OnWithTimedOff_DelayedOffUpdate: OnOff == FALSE and OffWaitTime > 0 (abstracted by offwait != 0) *)
            else if aow = b_false && onoff = onoff_FALSE && offwait != nat16_0 then
                event OnWithTimedOffReceived(ep, onoff_ctrl, on_time_field, off_wait_time_field);
                event OnWithTimedOffUpdateDelayedOff(ep);
                event OnWithTimedOffTimerStarted(ep);
                event OnWithTimedOffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_DelayedOff);
                out(internal,
                    (st_DelayedOff,
                     onoff_FALSE,
                     ontime,
                     min(off_wait_time_field, offwait),
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            (* T_OnWithTimedOff_TimedOnUpdate_FromOff_OffWaitZero *)
            else
                (* aow != 1, OnOff == FALSE, OffWaitTime == 0 *)
                event OnWithTimedOffReceived(ep, onoff_ctrl, on_time_field, off_wait_time_field);
                event OnWithTimedOffUpdateTimedOn(ep);
                event OnWithTimedOffTimerStarted(ep);
                event OnWithTimedOffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
                event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOff, st_TimedOn);
                out(internal,
                    (st_TimedOn,
                     onoff_TRUE,
                     max(ontime, on_time_field),
                     off_wait_time_field,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else if curst = st_BaseOn then
            (* T_OnWithTimedOff_TimedOnUpdate_FromOn *)
            event OnWithTimedOffReceived(ep, onoff_ctrl, on_time_field, off_wait_time_field);
            event OnWithTimedOffUpdateTimedOn(ep);
            event OnWithTimedOffTimerStarted(ep);
            event OnWithTimedOffResponseSent(ep, st_SUCCESS);
            event StateChanged(ep, st_BaseOn, st_TimedOn);
            out(internal,
                (st_TimedOn,
                 onoff_TRUE,
                 max(ontime, on_time_field),
                 off_wait_time_field,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* OnWithTimedOff from other states ignored *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- TimerTick trigger transitions for TimedOn and DelayedOff ---- *)
    else if cmd = trig_TimerTick then
        if curst = st_TimedOn then
            (* We only model decrement and expire abstractly.
               Conditions: OnTime != 0xFFFF, OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF, OnOff == TRUE. *)
            if ontime != nat16_FFFF && offwait != nat16_FFFF && onoff = onoff_TRUE then
                (* Abstract split between OnTime > 1 and == 1 using a boolean choice.
                   To keep determinism in this simple model, we only model the expire case
                   when OnTime equals 1 constant, else decrement. *)
                if ontime = nat16_1 then
                    (* T_OnWithTimedOff_Tick_TimedOn_ExpireToOff *)
                    event OnWithTimedOffTickTimedOn(ep);
                    event OnTimeDecremented(ep);
                    event OnWithTimedOffTransitionToOff(ep);
                    event OnWithTimedOffTimerStopped(ep);
                    event StateChanged(ep, st_TimedOn, st_BaseOff);
                    out(internal,
                        (st_BaseOff,
                         onoff_FALSE,
                         nat16_0,
                         nat16_0,
                         gsc,
                         startup,
                         prev_onoff,
                         supports_OnTime,
                         supports_OffWaitTime,
                         offonly_feat));
                    out(c, st_SUCCESS)
                else
                    (* T_OnWithTimedOff_Tick_TimedOn_Decrement *)
                    event OnWithTimedOffTickTimedOn(ep);
                    event OnTimeDecremented(ep);
                    event StateChanged(ep, st_TimedOn, st_TimedOn);
                    out(internal,
                        (st_TimedOn,
                         onoff_TRUE,
                         dec(ontime),
                         offwait,
                         gsc,
                         startup,
                         prev_onoff,
                         supports_OnTime,
                         supports_OffWaitTime,
                         offonly_feat));
                    out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            else
                (* Timers disabled => no change *)
                out(internal,
                    (curst,
                     onoff,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else if curst = st_DelayedOff then
            if ontime != nat16_FFFF && offwait != nat16_FFFF && onoff = onoff_FALSE then
                if offwait = nat16_1 then
                    (* T_OnWithTimedOff_Tick_DelayedOff_Stop *)
                    event OnWithTimedOffTickDelayedOff(ep);
                    event OffWaitTimeDecremented(ep);
                    event OnWithTimedOffTimerStopped(ep);
                    event StateChanged(ep, st_DelayedOff, st_BaseOff);
                    out(internal,
                        (st_BaseOff,
                         onoff_FALSE,
                         ontime,
                         nat16_0,
                         gsc,
                         startup,
                         prev_onoff,
                         supports_OnTime,
                         supports_OffWaitTime,
                         offonly_feat));
                    out(c, st_SUCCESS)
                else
                    (* T_OnWithTimedOff_Tick_DelayedOff_Decrement *)
                    event OnWithTimedOffTickDelayedOff(ep);
                    event OffWaitTimeDecremented(ep);
                    event StateChanged(ep, st_DelayedOff, st_DelayedOff);
                    out(internal,
                        (st_DelayedOff,
                         onoff_FALSE,
                         ontime,
                         dec(offwait),
                         gsc,
                         startup,
                         prev_onoff,
                         supports_OnTime,
                         supports_OffWaitTime,
                         offonly_feat));
                    out(c, st_SUCCESS)
            else
                (* Timers disabled => no change *)
                out(internal,
                    (curst,
                     onoff,
                     ontime,
                     offwait,
                     gsc,
                     startup,
                     prev_onoff,
                     supports_OnTime,
                     supports_OffWaitTime,
                     offonly_feat));
                out(c, st_SUCCESS)
        else
            (* TimerTick in other states ignored *)
            out(internal,
                (curst,
                 onoff,
                 ontime,
                 offwait,
                 gsc,
                 startup,
                 prev_onoff,
                 supports_OnTime,
                 supports_OffWaitTime,
                 offonly_feat));
            out(c, st_SUCCESS)

    (* ---- Any other command: no-op, echo state back ---- *)
    else
        out(internal,
            (curst,
             onoff,
             ontime,
             offwait,
             gsc,
             startup,
             prev_onoff,
             supports_OnTime,
             supports_OffWaitTime,
             offonly_feat));
        out(c, st_SUCCESS).


(* === 8. Main Process === *)

process
    (* One example endpoint; attacker can interact arbitrarily *)
    new ep: endpoint;

    (* Initialize attributes and state; we keep them symbolic. *)
    (* Start in StartupState with previous OFF, StartUpOnOff = null, timers zero, flags arbitrary. *)
    out(internal,
        (st_StartupState,
         onoff_FALSE,
         nat16_0,
         nat16_0,
         gsc_false,
         su_null,
         onoff_FALSE,
         cap_supports_OnTime_true,
         cap_supports_OffWaitTime_true,
         feat_OFFONLY_false));

    (* Run infinitely many sessions of the device process in parallel *)
    !Device(ep)

metadata.last_judge_feedback:
{
  "correct": false,
  "explanation": "The main syntax error is caused by use of '!=' in conditions, which is not valid ProVerif syntax. There are also several undeclared constants, an undeclared destructor predicate, wrong types for AttributeSet arguments, and missing events in queries compared to the FSM. FSM state/transition coverage is otherwise good.",
  "issues": [
    "Line ~239 (first occurrence): use of '!=' in condition 'offwait != nat16_0' – ProVerif does not support '!=' as an infix operator, causing a syntax error.",
    "Multiple lines: other uses of '!=' in tests on 'ontime' and 'offwait' will also break parsing.",
    "Lines with 'AttributeSet(ep, attr_..., \"FALSE\"/\"TRUE\")': second and third arguments are bitstring, but attr_* are declared bitstring and string literals are untyped; OK syntactically, but FSM attributes model booleans and ints – consider using typed constants instead of raw strings.",
    "Lines with 'out(c, st_SUCCESS)' etc.: OK syntactically, but relies on 'st_SUCCESS' and 'st_UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND' being declared constants of type status (they are).",
    "Semantic: Feature/capability constants (feat_OFFONLY_true/false, cap_supports_*, gsc_*, onoff_TRUE/FALSE, b_true/b_false) are used consistently, but 'onoff_TRUE'/'onoff_FALSE' are declared as 'bool' while 'onoff' variable is of type 'bool'; this is consistent.",
    "Semantic: Event 'AttributeSet' is declared as 'event AttributeSet(endpoint, bitstring, bitstring).' but is only used, no further issues.",
    "FSM: All FSM states have matching consts; transitions for Off, On, Toggle, OffWithEffect, OnWithRecallGlobalScene, OnWithTimedOff, and TimerTick are covered. No obvious missing FSM transition in this ProVerif model."
  ],
  "syntax_fixes": [
    {
      "line": 239,
      "error": "else if aow = b_false && onoff = onoff_FALSE && offwait != nat16_0 then",
      "fix": "(* Introduce an explicit predicate for inequality instead of '!='. First, add a function at the top: *)\nfun ne_nat16(nat16, nat16): bool.\n\n(* Then replace the line with: *)\nelse if aow = b_false && onoff = onoff_FALSE && ne_nat16(offwait, nat16_0) = b_true then",
      "explanation": "ProVerif does not support '!=' as an infix operator on terms. Comparisons must be expressed either via '=' in if-then or via an explicit Boolean function symbol."
    },
    {
      "line": 292,
      "error": "if ontime != nat16_FFFF && offwait != nat16_FFFF && onoff = onoff_TRUE then",
      "fix": "if ne_nat16(ontime, nat16_FFFF) = b_true && ne_nat16(offwait, nat16_FFFF) = b_true && onoff = onoff_TRUE then",
      "explanation": "Same '!=' issue on nat16 values; use the ne_nat16 predicate and compare its result to b_true."
    },
    {
      "line": 316,
      "error": "if ontime != nat16_FFFF && offwait != nat16_FFFF && onoff = onoff_FALSE then",
      "fix": "if ne_nat16(ontime, nat16_FFFF) = b_true && ne_nat16(offwait, nat16_FFFF) = b_true && onoff = onoff_FALSE then",
      "explanation": "Same as above for DelayedOff timer tick condition."
    },
    {
      "line": 71,
      "error": "const attr_OnOff: bitstring.\n...\n(* later uses: *) event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, \"FALSE\");",
      "fix": "(* Better-typed version: *)\n(* change declaration *)\nconst attr_OnOff: bitstring.\nconst val_FALSE: bitstring.\nconst val_TRUE: bitstring.\n\n(* then replace uses: *)\n(event AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, val_FALSE);  and  AttributeSet(ep, attr_OnOff, val_TRUE);)",
      "explanation": "Not a strict syntax error but improves type clarity and avoids raw string literals; ProVerif sometimes dislikes unquoted strings depending on frontend; explicit bitstring constants are safer."
    },
    {
      "line": 23,
      "error": "type bool.",
      "fix": "(* optional style fix only if you want standard built-in bool/bitstring separation; current declaration is valid. No change required syntactically. *)",
      "explanation": "This is syntactically fine; listed here only to confirm there is no issue. No change required."
    }
  ],
  "semantic_issues": [
    "All events used in processes are declared; no missing event declarations.",
    "All state and command constants used in queries and processes are declared; no missing constants.",
    "The queries quantify variables correctly and use declared events; semantics are consistent.",
    "Arithmetic and comparison are abstracted via min/max/dec and nat16_0/1/FFFF; this is intentional, but note that ne_nat16 is uninterpreted, so '!=' has only symbolic meaning you give it.",
    "GlobalSceneControl and StartUpOnOff attributes are modeled via booleans/bool3 with appropriate constants, but AttributeSet logs bitstrings and does not itself enforce type invariants; this is acceptable for logging but not for typing properties."
  ],
  "fsm_coverage": {
    "states_covered": [
      "st_StartupState",
      "st_BaseOff",
      "st_BaseOn",
      "st_TimedOn",
      "st_DelayedOff"
    ],
    "states_missing": [],
    "transitions_covered": 40,
    "transitions_missing": [],
    "notes": "Every transition in the JSON (startup, Off, On, Toggle, OffWithEffect, OnWithRecallGlobalScene, OnWithTimedOff, and all TimerTick transitions) has a structurally corresponding branch in the ProVerif Device process. Guards are translated using equality and feature/capability flags; numeric comparisons are abstracted via constants (0,1,FFFF) and min/max/dec."
  }
}
metadata.note: Best attempt saved - judge approval not obtained
